creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248387
py-django-otp-1.3.0-v1.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is a patch that updates www/py-django-otp to 1.3.0.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Switch to PEP517 build framework.
- Add default option QRCODE to reflect the settings in pyproject.toml.


QA:
~~~
poudriere -> OK (13.2-RELEASE amd64 for py38, py39, py310, py311)
